title: Safety Engineer
description:
Are you our next creator of change?

Do you want to be part of creating solutions for mitigating climate change? At Neste, you will be working for the world’s leading producer of sustainable aviation fuel and renewable diesel. Together we will accelerate transformation for a more sustainable future.

We are looking for you,

Safety Engineer

to join our Safety Team in the Singapore Refinery

You will focus on supporting and reporting to the Singapore Refinery Operational Safety Manager in the area of operational safety, workplace safety, Emergency and Crisis Management to deliver full compliance with Corporate Safety, local and regulatory safety requirements. In this job you will collaborate and work closely with the safety team, refinery engineers, supervisors and front-line personnel in Singapore and the Corporate Safety Team in Finland. 

You will provide your operational safety knowledge to our Refinery on matters of operational safety, such as Safety Leadership cultural shift, critical field controls & verifications, Contractor Safety, Workplace Safety & Health Committee, Fire Safety Management, Emergency Response and Crisis management.

In our Safety team, you will be required to support the Safety Manager and safety team in safety-related tasks and achieve our common goals. Together with you and your safety knowledge, we can make an impact today and keep our promises for tomorrow.


Reasons to join

Real impact right now. We create solutions for mitigating climate change and accelerating a shift to a circular economy. We live by our values every day; we care, we have courage, we cooperate.

Safety and caring. We value safety always and everywhere. We want our work to feel good and do good. At Neste, we nurture a culture where everyone is welcome and feels safe, respected and encouraged to be their unique true selves.

Exciting growth. Transformation brings new possibilities, fostering both courage and curiosity. As a global company, collaboration is the key, and we believe in flexible, smart ways of working. We support personal development with versatile learning and career opportunities.

More about the job

Your role in our team / in creating a sustainable future

Safety Engineer

  • Drive and execute operational safety, workplace safety, emergency response and crisis management 
  • Ensure refinery legal right to operate safely is delivered
  • Support refinery safety manager in strategic and tactical safety planning, implementation and execution of safety programs  

Operational Safety

  • Support and participate in refinery operational risk assessments, safety critical job and deviations reviews
  • Support corporate and refinery implementation of creating safety together to strengthen refinery safety cultural shift
  • Ensure the executions of critical safety risk controls, monitoring, trending, verifying and communicated for learnings & improvement

Workplace Safety

  • Together with refinery key stakeholders, implement contractors and suppliers safety management 
  • Support the Turnaround Safety Lead and team in turnaround planning, preparations executions and lesson learnt 
  • Support Workplace Safety & Health Committee initiatives and programs
  • Support and execute site fire safety management 

Incident Management

  • Participate as safety subject matter expert in incident investigation team, facilitate Safety department owned investigations or as directed
  • Prepare, maintain emergency response plan and execute training of company emergency response team to mitigate incidents, emergencies and compliance to National CERT Audits and Standard 
  • Support preparation of refinery crisis leader and crisis management team training and dive into the role and responsibility of crisis management team support during crisis 


Keys to success in this role / The best combination to succeed in this role

  • Minimum 6 years of safety working experience in the oil, gas or petrochemical industry 
  • Experienced to support and operationalise workplace safety, fire safety, emergency response and crisis management
  • Good understanding of local WSH regulations and have experience dealing with local regulators such as MHD, MOM, SPF, SCDF, etc.
  • Good communication, writing and analytical skill
  • Recognized Bachelor Degree in Safety or similar, master degree in Safety highly desired
  • Registered  WSHO and FSM, Noise Monitoring Officer added advantage 


Other strengths we value

We value candidates with transdisciplinary thinking, lifelong learning and digital literacy.


Let’s get you started

We look forward to receiving your CV and application.

We will do our best to contact you after the application time has ended. The recruitment process will include interviews and a possible aptitude assessment. The person selected for the position must pass a health examination including a drug test. A security clearance is obtained with your consent.

Neste in brief

Neste (NESTE, Nasdaq Helsinki) creates solutions for mitigating climate change and accelerating a shift to a circular economy. The company is the world’s leading producer of sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) and renewable diesel, enabling its customers to reduce their greenhouse gas emissions. Neste refines waste, residues and other renewable raw materials to high-quality renewable fuels at its refineries located on three continents. The company’s annual renewable fuels production capacity will be increased to 6.8 million tons in 2027.

Neste has high standards for sustainability and the company has consistently been recognized by several leading sustainability indices. In 2024, Neste's revenue stood at EUR 20.6 billion. Read more: neste.com

postedCompany.description:
We believe that it is the task of each generation to leave its children a healthier planet. To succeed in this, we create responsible choices, every day – choices that enable people to live a more sustainable life and consume fewer natural resources.

There are roughly 5,000 Neste employees in Europe, Asia and North America. We are the world’s largest producer of renewable diesel refined from waste and residues, and we are also bringing renewable solutions to the aviation and plastics industries. We are looking for the best professionals in their respective fields – people who have the will to make the world cleaner.
postedCompany.name: NESTE SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
